items.title: [正面] I sincerely hope that this project will not perish...
items.summary:
I sincerely hope that this project will not perish and will be brought to mind, it's very fckin good, both visually, and the accompaniment, and the pastel faded tones, as if everything is about to disappear, and the combat of a hsr, but with cards, and the plot is definitely more interesting, though I don't know what the f*ck they say because of the GPT translation, anyway bow at the feet of the Chinese brother, it will clearly be more interesting than Genshin, I hope they finish it

(idk if devs are reading the comments but i think its better to firstly translate with gpt to an english and than form english to another languages like russian)

[正面] ゲーム性は面白い。

items.summary:
ゲーム性は面白い。
翻訳がAIなのでストーリーは全スキップ、システムテキスト判断用としては使える。
純粋にデッキ組んでカードゲームを楽しめるならおすすめ。
多分日本人はほぼいないが、チャットとかあるわけでもないので不都合もない。
りりちゃんかわいい。

items.title: [负面] STEAM版根本不能玩，從去年10月到現在都不能玩，我前面為了支持它的美術和故事內容而儲值，都浪費掉...
items.summary: STEAM版根本不能玩，從去年10月到現在都不能玩，我前面為了支持它的美術和故事內容而儲值，都浪費掉了
